entry.title: Multi Combo box with input control in SAP Build Apps
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am using the Multi Combo box with input from the marketplace. I have a requirement to set some values in the list as selected during load of the app. For this i used the Set component property from marketplace and tried to set the SelectedTokenList. I was able to set the list to the control but after this the list in the multi combo box is not shown.

Can anyone help me to set the values in the multi combo box with input control and still get the list bound to the combo box.

Thank you,

Navya

entry.title: Document transfer from RCM to Onboarding 2.0
entry.content:
Hi,

We are trying to transfer the documents uploaded by the candidate in RCM to the review new-hire data page of onboarding 2.0 through CPI. Can anyone help if you have already achieved a solution by this kind of integration?

Regards,

Roma

entry.title: Re: SAP Alert Notification Service : Send Notifications to E-mail, Microsoft teams
entry.content:
Hi! Great post!

I have a question, regarding the email action behavior: is it possible to include more than one email address in the action? I have to notify a group about some events, but I could not set the field with another value than just one email address.

Thank you in advance

entry.title: Re: Auto populating standard field to custom field in Job...
entry.content:
Hello,

Were you able to solve this issue, wanted to know how did you manage this? I am facing the same issue now.

I am mapping standard Recruiter field which is autopopulating from position and now I have to auto populate to a custom Text field on a req.

Regards,

Varsha

entry.title: Re: Can the plan viewer be used stand-alone?
entry.content: The Plan Viewer is only accessible via DBISQL. There is not a direct way to start in the plan viewer but you can open an existing plan (.saplan) by double clicking on the file in windows or pass the plan file when starting from the command line i.e., dbisql ... MyPlan.saplan. You can also create a plan using the GRAPHICAL_PLAN sql function.

entry.title: Re: Creation of OData service with implementation of CRUD methods and `deep insert` method from scra
entry.content:
It's great that you've shared the code on GitHub and detailed steps using Eclipse.

This is a very old subject that has been written about extensively beginning from 2014 on SAP Community. Unfortunately, the new website makes it extremely difficult to search for the existing posts but here are some from the top of Google search.
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/multi-deep-insert-in-sapgateway-segw-approach/ba-p/13128422

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/step-by-step-development-for-create-deep-entity-operation/ba-p/13074869

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/multi-deep-insert-in-sapgateway-segw-approach/ba-p/13128422

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/step-by-step-procedure-for-create-deep-entity-in-post-operation/ba-p/13223107

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/steps-to-create-deep-insert-odata/ba-p/13349248

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/easy-way-to-write-data-via-a-deep-entity-in-odata/ba-p/13539510

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/how-to-implement-multi-level-create-deep/ba-p/13199274

You can see most of them contain pretty much the same information. It's nice that your post also includes the data generation piece, although it would be logical to use the service itself to do that, no? What is missing in most posts and this one is the high-level explanation of why are you doing this, the overview of steps involved (and why), and pointing out the limitations of example (e.g. I see SELECT *, there is no way this will support full OData request range).

Most posts just go right into "start creating stuff". It's not wrong but I find it difficult to work with developers who just blindly learn "step by step" and have no idea what they're doing in general. Also again, a lot has been written about this already. At this point, I think it's reasonable to expect the posts not just repeating same steps but be more like "hey, I read these posts but X was not clear" or "I have a better example", etc. Thank you though at least for acknowledging this is an old approach. Some authors don't even do that.

entry.title: Re: SAP Alert Notification Service : Send Notifications to E-mail, Microsoft teams
entry.content: One option would be to create a second action that emails a second email address.  I believe multiple actions can be added to a subscription.  I think for emailing a group, this would be best handled by the creation of a distribution list or dl with your company email.

entry.title: SAP Fiori Apps in BTP - How to Handle Output Files from Fiori (PDF)
entry.content:
We are developing our first fiori app - in BTP.    This app creates purchase orders and sales orders in our ECC system.    When the purchase/sales order is saved in SAP it generates a PDF output confirmation that we send to our customer and supplier by email.

Additionally we would like our fiori app to autosave these files to a shared network drive that is accessible from our ECC PRD server. 

Does anyone have any information or resources or experience building Fiori apps in BTP and how do you handle outputs from that system (whether they are PDF or Excel or any other format)?

I posted this question a couple of weeks ago to the Technology community (https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/btp-apps-amp-saving-outputs-to-local-network-storage/qaq-p/13673743) but got no response.

Any feedback or ideas would be appreciated!

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content:
Hi Community,
Excited to be here!

entry.title: Re: How to Update Table ARBCIG_SYSTIDMAP With BAPI or FM
entry.content: have you find the solution you need for this? currently in need of the same requirement. Please let me know if you have the FM/BAPI to make this work.

entry.title: Re: Issue with Depreciation Area Values in Assets
entry.content:
Hello,

Please check the below configuration:

SPRO-->IMG --> Financial Accounting (New) or Financial Accounting --> Asset Accounting -> Valuation--> Depreciation Areas --> Specify Transfer of APC Values

In your case, you will see Depreciation 02 is the adoption value from Depreciation Area 01, you may try changing this setting in your system and test it out.

Br, Vivek

entry.title: Default "Display as List option" in FBV3
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

If a document is parked using BAPI, when the user displays it in FBV3 or FBV2 it displays as Classic Display. Is there a setting or parameter (like FB00) that can default the display as ALV Classic?

Regards,

Vivek

entry.title: Internal Error using Quick Copy - SBO
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I'am having an Internal Error (-1) [131-183] using Quick Copy (#QuickCopy).

1 month ago it works perfectly and now 1 DB gives me thie error and 1 DB not.

Does someone have an idea?

Thanks a lot,

Francesca

entry.title: Re: Can we use BAPI inside Customer Exits or BADIs?
entry.content:
Yes we can use bapi inside badi .

I have worked on one requirement where badi is used to populate a bapi as some fields were not available in bapi so that it can be executed successfully.

entry.title: Re: Performance tuning techniques
entry.content:
There are so many performance tuning techniques in sap abap coding .

Few of them are very common and listed below :

1. Parallel cursor technique 

2. For all entries in 

3. select joins 

4. Using text elements to remove unnecessary ATC check errors and code inspector errors.

5. Debugging

entry.title: SuccessFactors Learning Subject Matter Expert Office Hours (English)
entry.content:
PLEASE NOTE: Selecting the ‘Will you be attending?’ option will NOT register you for the event.

To register for this event, please click here: Registration details can be found here (Authentication Required)

Please join us and our Recognized Expert partners as we jointly host our Subject Matter Expert office hours!

If you have questions about your SuccessFactors Learning product regarding best practices, use cases, 'how to' questions, etc. then please join our call and we'll have our expert answer your question live.

These sessions are held in an open online forum with other customers participating. There is no pre-planned content or presentation. Time is spent answering the questions you bring to the call. No advance registration required.

Note: Attendees can use the in-system audio and have the system call you directly or attendees can call in manually. To locate the call-in number for your region along with the passcode, please click on the information dropdown in the upper right corner of the meeting (indicated by an italicized i in a circle icon).

Each session is held twice per month.

Each session is held twice per month.

These sessions are held in an open online forum with other customers participating. There is no pre-planned content or presentation. Time is spent answering the questions you bring to the call. No advance registration required.


Note: Attendees can use the in-system audio and have the system call you directly or attendees can call in manually. To locate the call-in number for your region along with the passcode, please click on the information dropdown in the upper right corner of the meeting (indicated by an italicized i in a circle icon).

entry.title: SuccessFactors Customer Onboarding Webinar - North America
entry.content:
PLEASE NOTE: Selecting the ‘Will you be attending?’ option will NOT register you for the event.

To register for this event, please click here: Register Here

SuccessFactors Customer Onboarding Webinar Series (English)

Whether SAP SuccessFactors is new to you or your organization, we are excited to welcome you to the SuccessFactors Family! Join our monthly Customer Onboarding webinar to learn how to get started with SuccessFactors, see the key resources available to you, and lots more. What to expect?

  • Getting started: System access and S-User Management
  • SAP Product Support Best Practices
  • SuccessFactors Training Resources and Offerings
  • Live Demo of our one-stop-shop: The SAP SuccessFactors Customer Community

This is a MUST to get you started on a successful journey with SuccessFactors!

Please contact SAP_HXM_Onboarding@sap.com for any questions on this webinar series.

Here is a link to our Global schedule

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori Apps in BTP - How to Handle Output Files from Fiori (PDF)
entry.content: SAP already has readily available archiving solutions for output. Not sure why you would try to build that into an application BTP in place of using something that exists for archiving documents.

entry.title: Re: Creating ABAP Dataframes for SAP PAL
entry.content: Thank you for the hint. In fact, I didn't know this API. I think internally they use again the DDIF FMs, which is a pity, since these FM are not transactionally secure. Furthermore the API looks a little bit over-engineered.

entry.title: Re: SAP Alert Notification Service : Send Notifications to E-mail, Microsoft teams
entry.content:
Thank you Dan,

Yes, I created a second action that works, but it forces me to replicate the email properties (subject and body). It's not a big deal, but it could be more flexible if more than one email address can be used in one action. I have to test using a distribution list, anyway.

entry.title: ACH/ WIRE RETURN Process in S/4 Hana
entry.content:
ACH/ WIRE RETURN Process in S/4 Hana

Problem Statement:

ACH or wire returns are received in Electronic Bank Statement for the paid invoices. The return process needs to be applied to the invoices and reset the payments.

Since returns are usually not received soon, the actual payments are already cleared/reconciled with bank statements.

To reissue the correct payments, the reversal original payment would not possible unless bank reconciliation postings are reverted which if done can open all payments received in that bank statement. To avoid such hassles, Account Payables team posts duplicate invoice.

Adverse Impact of the existing process:

  • Duplicate postings for one invoice
  • Account Payables & Bank Reconciliation issues.
  • Delays in Audit Reporting
  • Issues with 1099 reporting due to over tax exposure for supplier due duplicate invoice postings & payments.

The following document suggests the best way to manage ACH/Wire returns:

Instructions for the Treasury Team

Step1: Apply the ACH/Wire return received in Bank Statement using “Reprocess Bank Statement Items” Fiori App”

 

Step2: Select “Post to G/L Account” and then select “Add.”  Enter and Post ACH/wire return amount to Accounts Payable adjustment GL account viz. 2100XXX.

 

Step3: Select “Simulate” to ensure the accounting and posting date are correct and post.

 

Step4: Now, we need to find the original ACH/wire payment which cleared in SAP. Get the bank reconciliation clearing document from there and reverse the entire batch. The posting period should be the date of the ACH/wire return. This is needed to allow reversal of the payments.

 

Step5: Reprocess all the payments under the ACH payment batch except for the returned payment (note: this step is not necessary for wire payments). Select “Post to G/L Account” and debit same AP adjustment GL account 2100XXX for the returned ACH/wire payment amount.

 

Step6: Select “Simulate” to ensure the accounting and posting date are correct and post.

 

Step7: The Treasury Team will send an email to the Accounts Payable Team to show a payment was returned and provide the supporting information from the Bank.

 

Instructions for the AP Team

Step8: Confirm A/P invoice is open- Reset and Reverse the payment document.

  • Please note if the ACH/wire return occurred during A/P close, the A/P team will need to book the following reversing journal in GL SAP, until A/P opens in the following period. This Journal entry will auto reverse in first working day of the following month.

Dr ACH/Wire Clearing Account                               XXXX
Cr AP adjustment Account                                                                                        XXXX

  • AP team will reset and reverse in the first working day of the following month.

If ACH/WIRE return received on 28th of Feb-2024, AP will book a JE in SAP GL with posting date of 28th Feb-2024. This JE will be reversed on 1st March -2024. (First working day of the month). AP will reset and reverse the payment document with the with the posting date of 01st March-2024.

Original Payment for Returns

 

 

 Step9: Go to the “Reset cleared items” App window displaying the payment document to be reversed.

 

Step10: Select the “Reset and Reverse” option (use the date of the return for the posting date) in case in same month.

Step11: Now you can see payment reversal document.

 

Step12: Confirm reversed document. The original invoice is open to repayment and no duplicate invoice needs to be posted.

Once, reason of payment failure is resolved you can repay the supplier.

Please find below the accounting entries for the ACH /Wire return process

                                                            Debit                      Credit

                                                                                    

1) Initial Invoice processed in AP

 

Expense

  

    2,216.12

 
 

A/P

  

    -2,216.12

     

2) Initial Invoice paid in AP

  

A/P

  

    2,216.12

 
 

Bank Clearing Account

  

   - 2,216.12

     

3) Initial Payment Cleared (EBS File)

 

Bank Clearing Account

  

    2,216.12

 
 

Cash Account

  

    -2,216.12

     

4) ACH Return (EBS File)

  

Cash Account

  

    2,216.12

 
 

AP Adjustment Account

  

    -2,216.12

     

5) Reverse Initial Payment Cleared (EBS File)

Cash Account

  

    2,216.12

 
 

Bank Clearing Account

  

    -2,216.12

     

AP Adjustment Account

  

    2,216.12

 
 

Cash Account

  

   - 2,216.12

     

7) AP Team Reverse Initial Payment

 

Bank Clearing Account

  

    2,216.12

 
 

A/P

  

   - 2,216.12

     

😎 AP Team Reissues Payment

  

A/P

  

    2,216.12

 
 

Bank Clearing Account

  

   - 2,216.12

     

9) Reissued Payment Cleared (EBS File)

 

Bank Clearing Account

  

    2,216.12

 
 

Cash Account

  

   - 2,216.12

The ACH/Wire return process explained above is simple and easily adoptable. It helps us resolves all the adverse impacts of faulty process and ensures accurate reporting. Hope, this document equips you well to tackle his problem in future.

entry.title: Re: Product Alert Update Dec 19 – SAP Analytics Cloud and Google Chrome
entry.content: We have a new updated blog here: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/third-party-cookies-and-sap-analytics-cloud/ba-p/13672672

entry.title: Re: Source CDS metadata incorrect with Replication Flow
entry.content: I am having the exact same issue. The meta data support from CDS views in general is frustrating. When you replicate remote tables, it ignores the "@EndUserText: {label: " unless you first cast the column to break the base table metadata label. For Replication flows, it completely ignores the "@EndUserText:" {label: and sets the business and technical name to the same values. I'll try to get SAP's attention on this one... See if we can get an update.

entry.title: Re: Hands-on Video Tutorials for Developing Multitenant Business Applications
entry.content:
Hello, 

All the links to the videos in the youtube is removed. I am looking for the videos of creating MTA based applications with custom schema seperation. Please help in finding them.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano 

I am a US Army Veteran who is looking to grow my career in SAP. Particularly implementation consulting. I’ve been using SAP for the past 3 years in regard to Materials Management and currently Procurement. I also have a bachelor’s degree in operations management from Arizona State University.

I am writing to request a receive a certification attempt.

 

Thank you,

Gabe

entry.title: Re: ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022 Available Now
entry.content:
Great initiative again, thanks to the whole team for this new 2022 version!


I just can't get it why comparing it to 1909 it has to compile absolutely everything and so slow. Even inserting a favorite transaction (for the first time) takes a few seconds.

Thanks again, and thanks in advance for clarifying my question.

Florin

 

P.S.

Okay, your documentation answered this already:

Slow initial start of many functions / applications

For technical reasons, we have delivered this initial shipment of SAP Cloud Developer Trial without the Load. Thus, the Load must be started on the fly. Thus, the initial start of many transactions and applications will be slower.

entry.title: Re: How to improve the ADT Class Runner with additional Features
entry.content:
Thanks for sharing! Interesting approach...

I usually write my own "runner" as ABAP report. The advantage here is that I can add a selection screen to feed the parameters to the methods. (SE24 also has a basic class test tool but it's not very convenient.) I've never bothered to create something generic though because it only takes a couple of minutes to generate a custom report for this. (I just comment out the code and write new when I need variations.) But this is obviously more ABAP Cloud compliant. Neat!

entry.title: Re: ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022 Available Now
entry.content:
@Jorge_Cervantes 

I've comitted the container after first run to an image without any SGEN, the resulting image size is 103G. After SGEN it became 117, so the delta by SGEN looks 14GB on my side.

entry.title: How do I develop a reservation workflow that triggers cost center owner approval?
entry.content: I want all  SAP reservations raised for consumables to go through to the cost center owner for approval. Can anyone help provide detailed steps to configure and trigger the SAP reservation workflow approval process and what would be the SAP T'code to use for that?

entry.title: Re: Using BAPI_BUPA_FS_BPADDITION_CHANGE to update table...
entry.content:
Anyone who is interested in the solution for this problem. 

With SAP Note 3402114 the problem can be solved. XO Events were not registered anymore what caused this problem.

entry.title: Re: Internal Error (-1) Occured [131-183] during Quick Co...
entry.content:
Hello Wesley,

I have the exact same problem but on SAP SQL 10.0.

How did you solve the problem? Can you help me?

Thanks,

Francesca

entry.title: Sub section in object cell
entry.content:
Hi Experts

Is it possible to have a section in an object cell that expands to show notes related to the order on click of + 

Click on - will then close the section

Is such a development supported

 Regards

entry.title: Let's meet-up in Poznań 🍻
entry.content:
Hi All. I will be in Poznań the day before the SAP CodeJam (https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-codejam/getting-started-with-machine-learning-using-sap-hana-and-python-pozna%C5%84-pl/ev-p/13660996), so if anyone is interested to join for a beer and to have a chat: please confirm, and let's meet 🍻

--Witalij

entry.title: ME49 price comparison
entry.content:
Dears

I need to add more than 1 factor in me49 not only the price factor

to compare the prices and delivery dates, freight costs , and quotations comments 

Can it be standard or need so enhancements

entry.title: Incorrect PRs for RM where FG made at external vendor and we order RM for vendor
entry.content:
My first ever question on this portal, apologies if the terms are too generic/incorrect.

 

Scenario/Set-up : I have my company target DC location "X" and an external vendor. My RM are delivered by suppliers to "X" and all of it is then posted to vendor using 541 movement at "X" and 101 movement at vendor. So, the stock on hand basically sits at vendor location. I place my POs for FG/maintain BOM/routing against "X" in ECC. 

 

The dep demand on the RM is calculated in APO at vendor level which appears as dist demand for "X". I was trying to make system to calculate/suggest me the PRs for these RM, but it doesn't make sense and I have below issues:

 

1. Timing - PR at target "X" is suggesting a delivery date where there is no requirement of an order[much advance than needed]. currently, Safety days supply maintained at vendor location with SZ method. 

 

2. Quantity : Overall qty seems to be okay, but they are coming up as multiple PRs with same date or 1 week apart[again no new production in the next 1 week window], I have min lot size and rounding value maintained at target "X" and nothing on Max lot size. 

 

3. Product Heuristic in APO is SAP_PP_002 at vendor location.

 

Please could anyone guide me thru this issue.

entry.title: Re: I have a similar issue.I started using a report was a...
entry.content:
Hi ghevia99, the Links tab will show up if there's more than 1 database object utilized on a report. If you are using a single Command object then there shouldn't be a Links tab.

Questions:

  1. What happens when you run the report directly in the Launchpad? (i.e. Not a schedule.)
  2. What happens with a brand new report based on the same Command object SQL and parameters?

entry.title: Re: May Developer Challenge - SAP AI Services

entry.title: Unable to write select query in BW transformations
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I want to display current date in one of the field routine of the BW transformations. I wrote the below code in field routine and getting the error message as
Incorrect syntax error near :CUR_DATE.

outtab = select (select current_date into CUR_DATE from dummy AS "CUR_DATE"),
"RECORD",
"SQL__PROCEDURE__SOURCE__RECORD"
from :INTAB;

Please guide me how to solve this error.

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Video URL in Guided Tour
entry.content: Did you use the 'embed' option? Chances are SharePoint isn't serving the file in a format that can be played in an iFrame.

entry.title: Re: Jump from DAYPR to detailed log / Incorrect generatio...
entry.content: A mi me paso, y me faltaban registros en la tabla T554C.

entry.title: Re: Unable to write select query in BW transformations
entry.content:
Hi,

try this without INTO and the alias is related to the column not to the table (dummy):

 

outtab = 
  select (select current_date from dummy) AS "CUR_DATE",
         "RECORD",
         "SQL__PROCEDURE__SOURCE__RECORD"
    from :INTAB;

 

Torsten

entry.title: How to Integrate Sybase Data into SAP Datasphere?

Hello Experts,

In the URL link below, it appears that no suitable connection methods are mentioned for using Sybase as a data source.

Mike Wu

entry.title: EWM Embeed S4 Migo with Returnable Packaging
entry.content:
Hello, please advise how to make evidence of Returnable Packaging with single step including EWM GR. Per my test MIGO has this functionality to make evidence of Returnable Packaging (501 M)  with non-EWM SLOC. But my scenario is, I have PO with EWM SLOC items and I would like to make evidence of RP with Non-EWM with Single step for user. What I found Im able to do that with two steps only - VL31N for EWM and MIGO for RP. I was not able to use MIGO for both as based on discussion I found MIGO is not able to post into EWM SLOC....

Thank you

Standa

entry.title: Re: TRS_SEC_ACC default field for ftr_create (field VWSFH...
entry.content:
There is a Parameter Id for most of fields. And Security Account field has Parameter ID "DEP".
When you launch any transaction for Security id and Security account and enter values for these fields, then SAP sets all Parameter id. When you enter another transaction for Security account, then system enters previous values. 

Security Account Field

The only problem that you can manipulate Parameter Id only with ABAP.

GET PARAMETER ID 'DEP' FIELD VALUE. " Sets Security Account value
FREE MEMORY ID 'DEP'. " Clears Security Account value

entry.title: Issue while settling WBS in GJ8G
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am settled WBS in CJ8G while settling I am getting below 2 entries

In CJ88 Below is the entry
Asset Clearing A/C Dr
To CWIP A/C

In FB50 Below is the entry
P &L A/C Dr
To Asset Clearing A/C

We created a variant for each Business area-wise & doing business area-wise (Via Variant) settlement in CJ8G.

The problem I am facing is some 2 Business areas are not generating FB50 entries rest is working fine.

Can anyone suggest a solution to this it is very urgent.

Thanks in Advance

Azar

entry.title: Re: Creation of OData service with implementation of CRUD methods and `deep insert` method from scra
entry.content:
Thank you!

Example on GitHub with this post both show how correctly expand methods and model by changing _EXT classes to implement custom CRUD and custom `deep insert`. Such topic is the most required in real projects and idea of this post was to help developers to use customization SAP SEGW with the right approach and also save time for understanding of implementation OData service by using a small simplified model and going through all steps of development to get results.

Yours sincerely,

Mikhail.

entry.title: Re: Write Widget names to a text box
entry.content:
Thank you SJohnson for the code!
some remarks for beginners:
1. one may rename the files to getWidgetName.js and getWidgetName.json

2. one needs to change the URL in the JSON file to "url": "/getWidgetName.js"

2. one needs to zip the files to upload them correctly (i attached a zip which I manually changed into a .txt, maybe that works ... otherwise one can copy paste the code out of the code preview from your post since i had trouble downloading your txt files)

entry.title: Re: Unable to write select query in BW transformations

entry.title: Re: May Developer Challenge - SAP AI Services
entry.content: Is this AI service using LayoutLM algorithms? - In the context of a specific business application as e.g. incoming invoices or delivery notes for a single company a large language model is maybe a sort of overkill, since there is so much more specific information available about these documents and these documents are contained in a very small subset of all documents? A lot of specific informatin is not used. What AI model would you suggest in such a case?

entry.title: Re: Customize Extended warehouse management monitor (/SCWM/MON)

entry.title: Re: Scale base calculation across the customers in one condition contract
entry.content: Hello Mari....I have exactly similar requirement. Were you able to achieve this and can you share the way you achieved this ?

entry.title: Re: Internal Error using Quick Copy - SBO
entry.content:
Hi francesca3007,

Kindly create an incident under the component SBO-ADM-INI-QC for SAP Business One Support Team to get it investigated.

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: SIT Kolkata 2024 - An insightful Panel Discussion on SAP AI
entry.content:
With the increasing relevance of AI in recent years, it is no surprise how AI is slowly amalgamating with SAP and soon it will be an integral part of all business processes. That's what the great industry minds think or at least that's what my takeaway was from SAP Inside Track(SIT) KOLKATA 2024, the event that all SAP enthusiasts await throughout the year. The very first panel discussion of the event focused on the future of SAP AI and the following are the key-points I learned:

  • We are already adapting to BTP, which enables application development with the capabilities of AI. Predictive analytics and intelligent automation help improve efficiency by streamlining operations, reducing errors, accelerating time-to-market, optimising resource utilisation, identifying market trends and many more. Large amounts of data are available from the day-to-day business processes and exposing that data to machine learning, natural language processing, etc. can enhance ERP functionalities because Data is the new Oil and AI is the tool to harness it.
  • By combining Robotic Process Automation with cognitive capabilities, SAP can enable end-to-end automation of complex business processes, from invoice processing and data entry to Supply Chain Management and regulatory compliance. With the rise of GenAI, generative AI, the entire process of the Supply Chain is simplified with Prompt LLMS - alerting and recommendations based on the insights derived from warehouse data.
  • Not just business processes, SAP AI has extensive applications - waste management, optimised energy consumption, planned city development, improved customer experience, and risk management. It can even be utilised in the direction of public welfare. Banks and financial institutions utilize SAP AI to detect fraudulent activities, personalize financial advice, and automate customer service interactions. AI-powered video surveillance systems, and predictive policing by analyzing historical crime data, can enhance public safety.
  • Even as we embrace AI, some concerns remain about how we must strike the balance between the human factor and artificial intelligence, i.e., the goal is not to replace humans but to augment human capabilities for a smooth business flow and enhanced customer experience. As pointed out by our eminent panelists, the goal of AI should be to have a better human life and the final decision-making authority should only be that of a human, especially in cases where there's sensitive data involved like in the medical field. It must be ensured that SAP AI solutions adhere to ethical principles and comply with industry-specific, data privacy regulations.

As GenAI and SAP continue to evolve in tandem, it is our responsibility as SAP enthusiasts to keep learning and implementing the same for a better future with sustainable growth. Being part of the SAP community, it would be a great fallacy on my part to not thank our sponsors for contributing to the success of the event and our esteemed panel members for sharing their knowledge and ideas on SAP AI, the Future of AI Technology at SIT Kolkata 2024.

Panel members:    Dr. Indranil Mitra, Partner PWC
                                Mr. Debasis Sen, CEO of New Bengal Consulting Pvt Ltd 
                                Dr. Amlan Chakraborti, CEO of ICOE
                                Mr. Srini Gottimukkula, VP, SAP Labs
                                Mrs. Asidhara Lahiri, Enterprise Architect, SAP
Panel moderator:  Dipanwita Dutta

@DataTherapist 

Artificial Intelligence 
SAP Inside Track

entry.title: Problem with the calculation of the group share, task 2141, group reporting, finance consolidation.
entry.content:
I have uploaded these percentages through a flat file, I have launched the standard task 2141, and, once executed, it is giving me these percentages, which don't quite add up, what is the reason for this?

In the percentage loading file, company 1053 has a percentage on itself, 1053, as you can see in the first screen shoot, which is called Treasury stock (Treasury stock is the number of shares that a company owns of itself). This percentage is 2%.

This specific case causes some doubts when running the calculations in task 2141, all of them related to the same company, directly and undirectly.

The first one is about the direct share of 1053. The percentage of 1045 on 1053 is 67%, and of 1053 on itself is 2%, so adding both percentages gives a direct percentage of 69%, and I think it should be 67%.

The second one is that, in turn, 1053 has a percentage on 1130, which is 77%. When the system calculates the indirect percentage, group share %, it comes out as 52.64285714, and, by calculating 0.67 x 0.77, the result is 0.52.

If the system incorporates treasury stock, it should behave like this. If so, how should it be calculated and interpreted?

entry.title: Re: Support Case vs Service Request – What's the difference?
entry.content: Thanks for sharing! Good stuff!

entry.title: nquiry: Flexible Workflow for Purchase Requisition in SAP Public cloud
entry.content:
I am reaching out to inquire about optimizing purchase requisition workflows within SAP, particularly in scenarios where there is one company code, one plant, and multiple purchase groups, with requisitions generated by 18 departments.

In our organization, we are seeking to enhance our procurement processes by implementing a more flexible workflow that caters to the diverse needs of our departments and purchase groups. Specifically, we are interested in establishing pre-conditions for purchase requisitioners or exploring potential Badis for agent determination based on user attributes.

Given our unique setup of one company code, one plant, 10 purchase groups, and requisitions originating from 18 different departments, we believe there is a need for personalized agent determination to streamline approvals and ensure efficient processing of purchase requisitions.

Could you please provide insights or guidance on how we can achieve this within the SAP environment? We are keen to learn about any best practices, recommended configurations, or potential customizations that can enable us to implement a more agile and responsive workflow.

Your expertise and advice on this matter would be greatly appreciated. If possible, could you also recommend any relevant resources or documentation that we can refer to for further information?

Thank you very much for your attention to this inquiry. I look forward to hearing from you soon.

entry.title: EML action - passing all fields of a selected row (List Report)
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

When performing an action on selected rows of a list report application, only keys get passed to implementation method, and then inside implementation, I need to select/read (query) data from entity_set to get all fields.

For example, in the following method, I only get keys to deal with data manipulation. 

METHODS some_action FOR MODIFY
IMPORTING keys FOR ACTION bdef~some_action.

Is there a way, I can get whole row (or all columns of a row), so that I need NOT to fetch the row data by another query like ABAP ALV report (in ALV for a given action, we can get the selected row/rows data), not just the key fields.

What is the syntax in EML to get all the columns of selected row/rows, not just the keys?

Thanks, Satyaki

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud for planning - Inverse Formula Behaviour
entry.content: Hi Ismael, you probably want to define Gross Sales (not Price) as a formula with inverses for Price and Volume in that order Hope this helps

entry.title: Re: Sales BOM
entry.content:
With the standard configuration, it is not possible to meet this requirement. You have to go with custom code validation.  Instead of hard coding the logic and if Business requirement changes at a later date, again you need to depend on ABAP team.  So what you can do is maintain a variable in TVARVC for a combination of plant, item category and material.
Since you should be having a different item category for normal sales and Sales BOM, as and when a sale order is created for a material, system should cross check this table and if item category and material in the sale order matches this table, system should propose the plant maintained in this table. This can be implemented in USEREXIT_SOURCE_DETERMINATION in program MV45AFZB

By maintaining a variable, it is easy for the Business not to depend on ABAP team if this requirement changes at a later date; instead, the users can themselves make changes according to their requirement

entry.title: Re: nquiry: Flexible Workflow for Purchase Requisition in SAP Public cloud
entry.content: Please do not post a question about SAP Web sites (community, etc.) if it's not a question about SAP Web sites! You can use Technology Q&A or any groups. See here: https://community.sap.com/t5/questions-about-sap-websites/how-to-ask-a-question-in-sap-community-gt-2024/qaq-p/13684801

entry.title: Re: May Developer Challenge - SAP AI Services
entry.content:
Hi, 

If the document / image has text in it, then the data is extracting. That is working fine. 
Whether the ingredient or quantity wont be determined from the picture which doesn't have any text? 

Thanks

entry.title: Re: SETUP SECURE LOGIN CLIENT (SLC) AND LOGIN USING X509 CERTIFICATE TOKEN [LINKED] #ATR
entry.content:
Thanks for the detailed blog. Adding 2 cents here.
Above SNC Client setting for Smart mode selection need to be done after system restart manually, can be achieved through windows registry as below:

Windows Registry Editor Version 5.00

[HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Policies\SAP\SecureLogin\Common\snc]
"SNCMode"=dword:00000001

entry.title: Delete Class assignment Button Not Visible
entry.content:
Hi Team

I have one query like , in SAP MDG Master Material in classification UI the Delete Class assignment button is visible at iniator , 00 step only.  But it is not visible at other approvers level.

Please let me know how i can make button visible at different approver levels.

Thanks.

entry.title: Save strategy in SAP TM - do actions trigger saves?
entry.content: I'm working in TM in S/4HANA 2021. Within the TOR_SAVE service, if I define a method that performs an action am I right that a save will automatically happen without coding it in the method? Then will that save trigger the save strategy again and potentially cause an infinite loop if there are no conditions around the action?

entry.title: Re: Replenishment from Bulk Storage (Y042) to Bulk Storag...
entry.content:
Hi 

And how you fixed that? I have the same topic.

Thanks in advance,

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud ALM - Granular Authorization to Scopes
entry.content:
Hi @IliasPap 

To my current knowledge the role collections in Cloud ALM do not offer what you’re looking for. 

To my understanding the scenario you describe can be achieved by

  • First, adding business users via the notification app as notification receivers
  • Second, creating events matching your different packages. If you need to go more granular for event definition you might in your IS-side IFlows add additional info into custom header fields that then are pushed into Cloud ALM. 
  • Third, defining notification methods by which the business user gets informed, e.g. email, MS-teams channel or IT-ticketing tool integration. 

You still might need to check which monitoring data from what is available in Cloud ALM is (able to be) transferred in the notification and needed for the business user to understand the case. In most cases they might be fine without a direct access to Cloud ALM.

Cheers - Ingo

entry.title: Re: Utilizing SAP BTP Integration Suite for Integration with SAP Sales and Service Cloud V2
entry.content:
Hi @kishorekumar_p ,

Thanks for the write-up. It was very easy to follow.

I have few questions though on the authentication piece (sorry if they are something really basic due to which they havent been explicitly mentioned in the blog). In your blog, you said:

Authentication is conducted via the OAuth URL (https://<HOSTNAME>/auth/token) using provided credential

However, I don't understand which credentials are you talking about? Is it the User ID/Pwd or really some OAuth Client ID and Secret? If User ID/Pwd then how is it beneficial than using basic auth? And if OAuthClient ID and Secret then from where one can generate client ID/secret?

Another question...in the documentation (LINK), there is another URL mentioned (<tenant_host_name>/sap/c4c/api/v1/iam-service/token). I want to ask, what is the different between "/auth/token" vs "/sap/c4c/api/v1/iam-service/token"? When to use which one? Also what credentials are supposed to be used for the API authentication to /sap/c4c/api/v1/iam-service/token?

Thanks so much for your support.

 

Best Regards

Saurabh

entry.title: Re: How to get the FIRST Date in a date column
entry.content: Did you get a solution for this? I am facing the same issue? Can we use and Advanced formulas to tag the first and last dates?

Thanks,
Jagadeesh C

entry.title: Physical inventory difference correction in ECC/S4
entry.content:
Hello, 

Could you please clarify how to correct inventory difference in the ECC/S4 after the physical inventory in the EWM is done. The available material on physical inventory is confusing as all three below T-codes seem to do the same function (correct inventory difference in ECC/S4) more or less. Appreciate if anyone please clarify the difference in the actions that can be done with the below t-codes. 

/N/SCWM/DIFF_ANALYZER

/N/SCWM/ERP_STOCKCHECK

/N/SCWM/WM_ADJUST

 

 

Regards

Bharath

entry.title: Is SAP a prospective career for college students?
entry.content:
SAP offers an exciting career path for college students. Here's why it's worth considering:

High Demand:
SAP skills are in high demand, with SAP being the market leader in enterprise application software. This means there's a plethora of job opportunities available.

Rewarding Career:

SAP consulting, in particular, offers an engaging and rewarding career. Consultants help organizations optimize their business processes using SAP applications.

Learning Resources:

SAP provides free learning journeys tailored for students. These resources offer valuable insights into how SAP software can benefit specific careers.

Certification Opportunities:

Students can pursue SAP certification at a discounted rate. Certification can set you apart in the job market and lead to exciting career opportunities.

Job Market Advantage:
SAP-certified professionals are often preferred over regular graduates for key positions. This certification can significantly enhance job prospects.

Career Growth:
There's a shortage of qualified SAP experts in niche areas, leading to high pay and excellent career growth opportunities for students entering the field.

Challenges and Solutions:

While entry into the SAP field can be challenging due to competition with seasoned professionals, internships and certifications can help students stand out and gain practical exposure.

Supportive Resources:

Platforms like the Student Zone website and SAP Community offer valuable support for students, including career exploration, job openings, and certification preparation.

In summary, SAP offers a promising career path for college students, with ample opportunities for growth and development. By taking advantage of learning resources, pursuing certification, and gaining practical experience, students can position themselves for success in the dynamic world of SAP.

entry.title: Quality Inspection for Aftermarket Services
entry.content:
I am part of a team designing a solution for aftermarket services (returns, warranty, etc.).  The requirement is to determine where/if quality inspection can be incorporated as part of the solution.  Options may be inspection upon return of the part, during the service of the part, or upon completion of service and before shipment.

It would appear the 06 inspection type could be used at receipt of the product and inspection types 10 or 11 could be used at shipment, but how does one incorporate quality inspection with a service order? 

I know I can associate the 14 inspection type with the service order type, but where do the requirements for the inspection (e.g., master inspection characteristics) get assigned?  Would we assign the inspection to a production order that actually performs the repair/warranty work?

entry.title: Re: Deploy Fiori Freestyle App to Cloud Foundry - Application missing?!
entry.content:
Hi @mariusobert ,

Thanks for the detailed steps.
I have the same requirement to develop a Fiori app with a standalone approuter and consume a remote CAP OData service in it. I followed your video and was able to create the desired results but I am not able to understand why 2 xs-app.json file gets created - 1 inside the app router folder and the other inside the Fiori app folder. Also, how does these 2 files work together. Can you please help understand this. 

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Reclassification of Revenue Recognized Value
entry.content:
I'm not exactly sure what you are asking RA to do, but you have full control on what accounts are used for the Rev Rec adjustments.  Also, in RA configuration you can specify if the system reverses pervious period postings and posts new values OR post net differences. 

Also note that with RA Method 7 you will be adjusting (accruing and deferring) costs as well as revenues since the POC is applied to both.

Period 1

RANI = 50k

P&L Revenue = 150k from invoice

RA adjustment would be to defer 100k from the P&L to the B/S.  100k (dr.) P&L Revenue, 100k (cr.) Liability acct.

Period 2

RANI = 200k

RA adjustment would be to reverse the period 1 posting and accrue 50k on the P&L.  

100k (cr.) P&L revenue, 100k (dr.) Liability account

50k (cr.) P&L revenue, 50k (dr.) Asset account

entry.title: Why html_repo_runtime is added in the resources section of mta.yml file?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I'm trying to create a basic MTA project with a standalone approuter and followed the following steps - 

1. New project from template -> Basic MutliTarget Application.
2. Right click on mta.yml file -> Create MTA module from template.
3. Choose Approuter Configuration.
4. Select Standalone approuter and choose NO for "if you plan to add UI" and click on finish.
5. The approuter module is added to the project and the mta.yml file is updated.
6. A new resource is added to the mta.yml file - 

    service: html5-apps-repo
    service-plan: app-runtime

I'd like to know why the html5-app-repo resource is added even though I chose not to add UI.

 

Thanks
